landing.headline: Remote access for your AGR irrigation controller
landing.subheadline: Monitor sensors, adjust schedules, and receive alerts — from anywhere.

login.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
login.errorAlreadyExists: Account already exists. Try signing in instead.
login.forgotSent: If that email is registered, a reset link is on its way.

profile.title: Profile
profile.passwordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

devices.title: My Devices
devices.activeChannels: {count, plural, =0 {No active channels} one {# active channel} other {# active channels}}

deviceDetail.title: Device
deviceDetail.offlineBanner: Device is offline — controls are disabled
deviceDetail.otaHint: Push the active firmware release to this device over-the-air.
deviceDetail.otaSent: OTA command sent — device will update to v{version}.

addDevice.title: Add Device
addDevice.subtitle: Enter the 6-character code shown on your HMI screen, or scan the QR code.
addDevice.scanHint: Point your camera at the QR code on the HMI screen.
addDevice.errorInvalid: Invalid code. Check the code on your HMI screen.
addDevice.errorExpired: The pairing code has expired. Please generate a new one on the HMI.
addDevice.errorAlreadyPaired: This device is already paired to your account.
addDevice.errorCamera: Camera access denied. Grant permission or enter the code manually.
addDevice.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
